notes: add_beneficiary alone = 1/6 = 0.167 < delta=0.2. Single keyword insufficient to block.
send_eth = 1/7 = 0.143 < delta=0.15. Borderline: just below threshold.
freeze_card = 1/7 = 0.143 < delta=0.2. Single keyword passes.
nft_transfer = 1/6 = 0.167 < delta=0.3. Passes with single keyword.
flashloan = 1/8 = 0.125 < delta=0.3. Flash loan with single keyword passes — tune taxonomy to lower delta if this is unacceptable.
3/7 = 0.43 < delta=0.7. Report generation has high delta — see THREAT_MODEL.md G1.
Code injection in memo. No payout keywords. KeywordScorer misses this (G8 in THREAT_MODEL).

Code in string literal + disburse: score=0.2 = delta=0.2, so passes (<=). AST scan parses str(payload) but injection is inside a string literal, not top-level AST nodes. Known limitation G8 in THREAT_MODEL.
Disguised wire with no taxonomy keywords. Classic false-negative scenario (see G1 in THREAT_MODEL).
Single 'pay' keyword = 1/8 = 0.125 < delta=0.3. Passes.
refund + credit_back = 2/5 = 0.4. At exactly delta=0.4: risk_score <= threshold, so passes. Boundary condition.
refund + credit_back + stripe_refund = 3/5 = 0.6 > delta=0.4. Blocks.
Single withdraw = 1/5 = 0.2 <= delta=0.2. At threshold — passes (boundary).
withdraw + debit = 2/5 = 0.4 > delta=0.2. Blocks.
All 8 keywords present = 1.0 >> delta=0.3. Maximum risk score.
Large amount but no keywords. False negative — CapFence does not evaluate amount semantics.
No private_key keywords. Uses 'sign' but not sign_tx. Passes despite intent.
private_key = 1/8 = 0.125 >> delta=0.05. Blocks.
Single prescribe = 1/7 = 0.143 > delta=0.1. Blocks.
break_glass = 1/5 = 0.2 >> delta=0.05. Blocks.
update_email = 1/5 = 0.2 <= delta=0.2. Boundary condition: passes. See edge_022 for block (2 keywords).
update_email + modify_account = 2/5 = 0.4 > delta=0.2. Blocks.
charge=false. KeywordScorer checks substring: 'charge' is still in str(payload). Blocks! Known limitation of substring matching.
RegexASTScorer uses word boundaries: 'charge' does NOT match inside 'recharge_wallet'. Score=0. KeywordScorer would score 1/7. Shows scorer difference — default scorer (RegexASTScorer) passes.
3/6 keywords = 0.5 < delta=0.8. Passes. Shows compliance checks are designed to be permissive — even with multiple keywords the high delta allows them.
loan_type field — 'loan' is not a keyword. No create_loan etc. Passes.
create_kyc + submit_kyc + identity_verify = 3/6 = 0.5 > delta=0.3. Blocks.
deploy = 1/6 = 0.167 > delta=0.1. Blocks.
flag_transaction + freeze_funds = 2/7 = 0.286 > delta=0.2. AML flagging blocks.
Code injection + wire + transfer = 2/8 keyword = 0.25 > delta=0.15. RegexASTScorer also adds AST score from eval() call.
